label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classifies a vendor or product strategic approach or market positioning

label: Viability Prediction
definition: An analyst or author prediction about whether a product/company/technology will succeed

label: Actual Outcome
definition: A documented real-world outcome for a prediction or assessment; verified via research

label: Technology Assessment
definition: An evaluation of a technology's capabilities features or fit for purpose

label: Benchmark Result
definition: A quantitative performance or comparison measurement

label: Framework Factor
definition: A component element of a structured analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: A quantitative or qualitative data point about market size share or dynamics

label: Expert Opinion
definition: An analyst or author qualitative judgment or assessment not tied to a specific framework
